overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a gold convertible driving along a coastal highway through a futuristic city. The vehicle passes through a tunnel and navigates winding roads with palm trees and skyscrapers visible in the background under clear sunny skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with rocky hills and city views

agents.ego_description: following a box truck along a multi-lane highway approaching a tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: box truck driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: row of palm trees lining the left side of the highway
reddish rocky terrain with sparse vegetation rising on the right
metal guardrail running along the left side of the road
distant futuristic skyscrapers visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a convertible driving along a sunny coastal highway. Palm trees line the left side while rocky hills rise on the right. The camera follows the vehicle as it approaches a tunnel entrance, with a futuristic city skyline visible in the distance ahead.

approaching tunnel exit with bright daylight visible at the end

agents.ego_description: maintaining speed through the tunnel while following the truck ahead

notable_agents.action: box truck driving ahead through the tunnel

linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
green caution sign above the tunnel entrance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a concrete tunnel, transitioning from bright natural sunlight to artificial fluorescent lighting. The camera follows the car through the enclosed space with smooth walls and ceiling lights, maintaining a steady distance behind the box truck ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with ocean views and palm tree lining

events.description: exiting tunnel onto open coastal road with ocean visible to the right

blue ocean water visible beyond the rocky coastline

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens to a bright coastal highway with the ocean visible to the right. The road curves gently through palm tree-lined terrain with rocky cliffs dropping to the water below. The vehicle maintains speed following the truck along the scenic coastal route.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding highway approaching futuristic downtown with industrial structures

events.description: opposing traffic vehicles pass by on the left while navigating curves

agents.ego_description: driving along winding road with futuristic city skyline ahead, passing opposing vehicles in the left lane

opposing cars passing in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall modern glass and steel skyscrapers of the downtown district
tall industrial transmission towers with cables running alongside the road

segments.scene_description: The highway winds through terrain with the futuristic city skyline growing larger ahead. Industrial towers line the left side while opposing traffic passes by. The road curves through rocky hills with palm trees, approaching the dense urban center with towering skyscrapers visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunny coastal highway that passes through a tunnel before approaching a dense futuristic metropolis. It begins by trailing a gold convertible past palm trees and rocky hills, moving steadily toward a tunnel entrance with a distant city skyline on the horizon. As the vehicle enters the concrete tunnel, the bright natural sunlight shifts abruptly to artificial fluorescent lighting within the enclosed space. The scene then opens back into the brilliance of the coast, where the road curves along rocky cliffs and the ocean becomes visible to the right. Finally, the highway winds through industrial towers and opposing traffic, with the futuristic skyscrapers growing larger and more imposing as the camera draws closer to the urban center.
